name: Philippine Health Insurance (PhilHealth)
description: National health insurance providing coverage for hospitalization and medical procedures
benefits: Inpatient/outpatient coverage, maternity, TB-DOTS, Z-benefit packages
office: Nearest PhilHealth Local Health Insurance Office (LHIO)
next_steps: Determine your membership category (employed, self-employed, indigent)
Visit nearest PhilHealth office or register online at philhealth.gov.ph
Submit required documents and fill out PMRF
